name: back-on-track
description: Offline self-management toolkit for older adults with chronic low back pain.

scripts.typecheck: node --check app.js && node --check content.js && node --check exercise-anim.js && node --check sw.js && node --check tools/serve.cjs && node --check tools/lint.cjs && node --check tools/build-check.cjs && node --check tools/run-with-server.cjs && node --check tools/visual.dev.js && node --check tools/a11y.dev.js
scripts.e2e: node tools/run-with-server.cjs dev-browser --headless --browser back-on-track-e2e --timeout 40 run tools/verify.dev.js
scripts.visual: node tools/run-with-server.cjs dev-browser --headless --browser back-on-track-visual --timeout 40 run tools/visual.dev.js
scripts.a11y: node tools/run-with-server.cjs dev-browser --headless --browser back-on-track-a11y --timeout 30 run tools/a11y.dev.js
